---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for K:BOT
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

**Proposed solution**
How should this work?

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.

**Domain**
- [ ] CLI / Core
- [ ] Open Source tools (`kbot oss`)
- [ ] Academic / Research
- [ ] Scientific Computing
- [ ] New AI Provider
- [ ] New Specialist Agent
- [ ] Plugin System
- [ ] IDE Integration (MCP/ACP)
- [ ] Web Companion (kernel.chat)
- [ ] Other

**Would you be willing to submit a PR?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No
